name: Catherine | Deepwoken
description:
A Celtor stuck in a wall.. how the hell did she even get in there?

My Deepwoken OC era has begun.. Oh right this image isn't colored, she looks like your average Celtor, one of the lighter variants (light green-ish), no dye packets or anything. Let me know if you wanna see more of these cause I got a whole lineup ready.
creator: CleverLazyness
